landing.heroSubtitle: Let AI hire humans to test your product. Get structured, agent-parseable feedback reports in hours, not weeks.
landing.installSkillDesc: Add human testing to any AI coding agent — Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and 30+ more. Reports are structured for agents to parse and act on directly.
landing.poweredBy: Powered by {link} open agent skills ecosystem
landing.step1Desc: Call {code} from your AI agent or use the web form. AI generates a structured test plan automatically.
landing.step2Desc: Real testers claim your task, use your product, and provide guided feedback with screen recording, audio narration, and NPS rating.
landing.step3Desc: AI generates a structured report with [CRITICAL]/[MAJOR]/[MINOR] severity tags, evidence, impact analysis, and P0-P3 prioritized recommendations — designed for your AI agent to parse and act on directly.
landing.forTestersDesc: Earn credits by testing real products. Browse available tests, complete guided feedback tasks, and build your testing portfolio.
landing.realReportDesc: This is a real AI-generated report from our platform. Reports use consistent markdown structure with severity tags, evidence fields, and priority labels — so your AI agent can read and act on them directly:
landing.footerTagline: Real human feedback for AI-built products.

login.title: Log In
login.subtitle: Sign in to your human_test() account

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitleCode: Enter the verification code sent to your email
register.subtitle: Join human_test() and start testing or creating tests
register.name: Name
register.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
register.passwordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
register.waitRetry: Please wait {seconds}s before requesting another code
register.codeSent: Verification code sent to your email
register.autoLoginFailed: Registration succeeded but auto-login failed. Please log in.

tasks.noTests: No tests available yet. Be the first to create one!

createTask.title: Create a Test
createTask.focusPlaceholder: e.g. Test the checkout flow and payment experience
createTask.aiGenerate: AI will generate test steps from your URL
createTask.generateFailed: Failed to generate test plan. You can still submit without a preview.

taskDetail.videoAnalysisNote: Video analysis may take several minutes. You can leave this page and come back.
taskDetail.reportFailed: Report generation failed. Please try again.
taskDetail.mediaAnalysisFailed: Media analysis failed for this tester.
taskDetail.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this task? Credits for unclaimed slots will be refunded.

submit.firstImpressionPrompt: You just opened {url}. What's your first reaction? (1-3 sentences)
submit.worstPlaceholder: What was confusing or could be improved?

test.hasRecordingDesc: A screen recording from a previous session was found. Would you like to use it or record a new one?
test.permissionsIntro: The following permissions will be requested to record your testing session:
test.macPermissions: On macOS, you may need to grant Screen Recording and Microphone permissions in System Settings. Chrome may require a restart after granting.
test.howStep3: The target website will open in a new tab
test.howStep4: Complete the test steps in the new tab
test.howStep5: Return here to stop recording when done
test.permissionDenied: Permission denied. Please allow screen recording and microphone access, or skip recording.
test.noDevice: No recording device found. Please check your microphone settings.
test.timeWarning: Less than {min} remaining. Recording will stop automatically.
test.targetOpen: Target website is open in a new tab. Complete the test steps there.
test.clickHereRedirect: If not redirected automatically, click here
test.skipUploadConfirm: Recording will not be saved. Are you sure you want to skip?
test.activeSession: You have an active recording session. What would you like to do?
test.interruptedDesc:
Your browser tab was unloaded during recording, so the video/audio data was lost.
You can re-record or continue to submit feedback without a recording.

settings.title: Settings
settings.regenerateConfirm: This will invalidate your current API key. Continue?

onboarding.welcomeDesc: You have 100 credits — enough to launch a 5-person test, or earn more by testing others' products first.
onboarding.testFirstSub: Browse available tests and earn credits
onboarding.testFirstDesc: Complete testing tasks from other developers and earn credits for each test you complete.
onboarding.launchOwnSub: Get real human feedback on your product
onboarding.launchOwnDesc: Create a testing task and get structured feedback from real users. Costs credits per tester.
